actions.script: var googleBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-testid="login-with-google"]'); var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); var hasLoginBtn = false; for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { if (btns[i].textContent.indexOf('Continue with Google') !== -1 || btns[i].textContent.indexOf('Log in') !== -1 || btns[i].textContent.indexOf('Sign up') !== -1) { hasLoginBtn = true; break; } } if (googleBtn || hasLoginBtn || window.location.pathname.indexOf('login') !== -1) { return 'not_logged_in'; } return 'logged_in';
